Patient Zero is a term used to describe the first person in which a [[Hydroplane]] is observed. 

Identifying Patient Zero is useful for figuruing out the genealogy of a hydroplane, the reason why it is appealing, and how it can be cured.

== List of Patient Zeros ==

* [[Saint Paul]] of [[Pauline Christianity]]

== See Also ==

* [[Memetic epidemeology]]

== References ==
[[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Patient Zero]][[sn:Patient Zero]]
[[Category:Pages]]
